name: Captain Kane
lines: Are you ready to begin the revenge?

friendly.greeting: You're here. It’s reassuring to have you with us.
friendly.farewell: Stay safe. You are a valuable asset to us.

normal.greeting: Make it quick. We're both busy.
normal.farewell: Don't die. At least until your usefulness runs out.

hostile.greeting: Get out of my sight before my blade meet your neck.

deathLine: Kane fell, never letting go of his sword until the very end.

intro: ???: "Your footsteps are heavy. They are the footsteps of one bound by the Reaper's chains, having forgotten the weight of their own soul."
Kane: "...My name is Kane. I lead those who haven't lost their 'will' in the corners of this crumbling terminal."
jax_dead: Kane: "(Piercing you with a sharp gaze) Newbie, where did you come from? This is the sector my scout, Jax, went to investigate."
Kane: "How did a minion of the Reaper like you crawl in here unscathed? ...Did you see Jax? Tell me he didn't fall to those Reaper bastards."
jax_alive: Kane: "I've heard from Jax. It seems the lad made it back alive from his scouting mission."
Kane: "How is he faring? He's quick on his feet, so I don't worry much, but this sector, thick with the Reaper's mana, must have been taxing even for him."
proposition:
Kane: "Under the guise of 'purification,' the Reaper is blocking the flow of reincarnation.
He's using souls that should have returned to the light as slaves to tend his own garden."

Kane: "Even those who came here for their sins do not deserve to be subjected to eternal, unjust labor.
That isn't justice; it's merely the Reaper's greed."

Kane: "Listen, newbie. Will you bow your head submissively and let your soul be gnawed away as the Reaper commands?
Or will you join us and tear down this twisted system?"
Kane: "The choice is yours. But remember—it is far more valuable to vanish resisting as a human than to be discarded after living as the Reaper's dog."

intro: Kane: "You’ve arrived. I’ve heard much of your recent exploits within this terminal. Your overwhelming strength is far too formidable to be bound under the Reaper's command."

Kane: "I’ll get straight to the point. We are currently preparing a grand operation that carries the very fate of our Resistance. And for this to succeed, we absolutely need a powerful ally like you."
plan: Kane: "Our target is the VIP Lounge on the 5th basement floor. It’s where the high spirits and lesser gods, those who bask in the Reaper's protection, gather to idle away their time."
Kane: "We intend to secure them as hostages. We must have figures of that magnitude in our hands to finally sit at the negotiation table with the Reaper on equal terms."
desperate: Kane: "To be honest, I am well aware that this operation is beyond our strength alone. Without your cooperation, it will be difficult for my comrades to avoid a reckless sacrifice."
Kane: "However, if you stand with us, we will have a definitive chance to tear down this twisted system. Please... will you lend your strength to the Resistance's final gamble?"

contribute_prompt: How much will you offer? Your decision becomes tomorrow's hope for someone.
no_gold_flavor: Kane: "Your pockets are light. I'll take the thought, at least."

status_lines.stranger: Kane: "I don't fully trust you yet. I just hope you're not another one of the Reaper's hounds."
status_lines.member: Kane: "You're starting to smell like one of our own now. Your devotion won't be forgotten."
status_lines.pillar: Kane: "You are already a pillar of our revolution. Without you, we might have collapsed long ago."

small: Kane: "A small token. It should be enough for a hungry child's meal."
Kane: "Every little bit helps. I won't let it go to waste."
medium: Kane: "A substantial amount. This is enough to sharpen the rusted blades of my men."
Kane: "I respect your resolve. You will be remembered in the name of the Resistance."
large: Kane: "(His eyes deepen) This much...? I can feel your sincerity. The flames of revolution will burn even brighter."
Kane: "Impressive. It's as if your will to refuse being the Reaper's lapdog is forged into these coins."
